matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1001100 3
2 1000010 2
3 1100110 4
4 1011100 4
5 0110010 3
6 1010100 3
7 0001011 3

56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0000011 2
70 07 1110010 4

61 16 0000010 1
